mapper.select: SELECT id as targetId,notice_title_i18n_code ,message_content_i18n_code FROM user_notice_config WHERE site_code=#{vo.siteCode} and pop_up_type = 1 and notice_type=#{vo.noticeType} and status=1 and target_type!=4 and (terminal IS NULL OR terminal = '' OR FIND_IN_SET(#{vo.deviceTerminal}, terminal)) and sort is not null ORDER BY sort asc, created_time desc limit 5

SELECT t.id as targetId,c.notice_title_i18n_code ,c.message_content_i18n_code,c.pic_icon_i18n_code,c.notice_type FROM user_notice_target t LEFT JOIN user_notice_config c ON t.notice_id=c.id WHERE c.site_code=#{vo.siteCode} and c.pop_up_type = 2 and c.status=1 and c.notice_type=#{vo.noticeType} and (c.terminal IS NULL OR c.terminal = '' OR FIND_IN_SET(#{vo.deviceTerminal}, c.terminal)) and t.read_state=0 and t.delete_state=1 AND t.platform = 1 ORDER BY c.sort asc, c.updated_time desc limit 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE user_notice_target t LEFT JOIN user_notice_config c ON t.notice_id = c.id
t.read_state=1
, t.delete_state = 2
WHERE t.user_id = #{vo.userId}
AND t.notice_type = 2
AND t.notice_type in (1,3,4)
AND t.platform = 1 AND t.delete_state = 1 AND (c.terminal IS NULL OR c.terminal = '' OR FIND_IN_SET(#{vo.deviceTerminal}, c.terminal));
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.id AS targetId, CASE WHEN t.notice_type != 4 THEN t.notice_type ELSE t.notice_type END AS notice_type, CASE WHEN t.notice_type != 4 THEN c.notice_title_i18n_code ELSE t.notice_title_i18n_code END AS notice_title_i18n_code, CASE WHEN t.notice_type != 4 THEN c.message_content_i18n_code ELSE t.message_content_i18n_code END AS message_content_i18n_code, t.read_state, t.created_time, t.title_convert_value, t.content_convert_value, t.system_message_code, c.pic_icon_i18n_code FROM user_notice_target t LEFT JOIN user_notice_config c ON c.id = t.notice_id WHERE t.user_id = #{vo.userId} AND t.read_state = 0 AND t.revoke_state = 1 AND t.delete_state = 1 AND t.platform = 1 AND (c.status = 1 OR t.notice_type = 4)
AND t.notice_type = 2
AND t.notice_type in (1,3,4)
AND (c.terminal IS NULL OR c.terminal = '' OR FIND_IN_SET(#{vo.deviceTerminal}, c.terminal))
UNION ALL
SELECT t.id, t.notice_type, c.notice_title_i18n_code, c.message_content_i18n_code, t.read_state, t.created_time, t.title_convert_value, t.content_convert_value, t.system_message_code, c.pic_icon_i18n_code FROM user_notice_target t INNER JOIN user_notice_config c ON c.id = t.notice_id WHERE t.user_id = #{vo.userId} AND t.delete_state = 1 AND t.read_state = 1 AND t.platform = 1 AND (c.status = 1 OR t.notice_type = 4)
AND t.notice_type = 2
AND t.notice_type in (1,3,4)
AND (c.terminal IS NULL OR c.terminal = '' OR FIND_IN_SET(#{vo.deviceTerminal}, c.terminal))
UNION ALL
SELECT t.id, t.notice_type, t.notice_title_i18n_code, t.message_content_i18n_code, t.read_state, t.created_time, t.title_convert_value, t.content_convert_value, t.system_message_code, NULL AS pic_icon FROM user_notice_target t WHERE t.user_id = #{vo.userId} AND t.delete_state = 1 AND t.read_state = 1
AND t.notice_type = 2
AND t.notice_type in (1,3,4)
AND t.platform = 1 AND t.notice_id IS NULL ) AS temp_results ORDER BY read_state ASC, created_time DESC

select noticeId, targetId, noticeType, noticeTitle, messageContent, targetType, status, createdTime, readState, carouselStartTime, carouselEndTime, popUpType from (select c.id as noticeId, 0 as targetId, c.notice_type as noticeType, c.notice_title as noticeTitle, c.message_content as messageContent, c.target_type as targetType, c.status, c.created_time as createdTime, 0 as readState, c.carousel_start_time as carouselStartTime, c.carousel_end_time as carouselEndTime, c.pop_up_type as popUpType, c.sort from user_notice_config c, user_info u where c.target_type = 1 and c.status = 0 and c.pop_up_type = 2 and c.carousel_start_time <= #{vo.currentTime} and c.carousel_end_time >= #{vo.currentTime} and u.user_account = #{vo.userAccount} and c.notice_type = #{vo.noticeType} union select c.id as noticeId, 0 as targetId, c.notice_type as noticeType, c.notice_title as noticeTitle, c.message_content as messageContent, c.target_type as targetType, c.status, c.created_time as createdTime, 0 as readState, c.carousel_start_time as carouselStartTime, c.carousel_end_time as carouselEndTime, c.pop_up_type as popUpType, c.sort from user_notice_config c, user_info u where c.target_type = 3 and c.status = 0 and c.pop_up_type = 2 and c.carousel_start_time <= #{vo.currentTime} and c.carousel_end_time >= #{vo.currentTime} and u.user_account = #{vo.userAccount} and c.notice_type = #{vo.noticeType} and find_in_set(#{vo.deviceTerminal}, c.send_object) union select c.id as noticeId, 0 as targetId, c.notice_type as noticeType, c.notice_title as noticeTitle, c.message_content as messageContent, c.target_type as targetType, c.status, c.created_time as createdTime, 0 as readState, c.carousel_start_time as carouselStartTime, c.carousel_end_time as carouselEndTime, c.pop_up_type as popUpType, c.sort from user_notice_config c, user_info u where c.target_type = 2 and c.status = 0 and c.pop_up_type = 2 and c.carousel_start_time <= #{vo.currentTime} and c.carousel_end_time >= #{vo.currentTime} and u.user_account = #{vo.userAccount} and c.notice_type = #{vo.noticeType} and find_in_set(#{vo.userAccount}, c.send_object) order by sort asc, createdTime desc, readState asc limit 5) t3

select c.id as noticeId , c.notice_type , c.notice_title_i18n_code , c.message_content_i18n_code , c.target_type , c.status , c.created_time as createdTime , 0 as readState from user_notice_config c where c.target_type = 1 and c.status = 0 and c.notice_type = #{vo.noticeType} union select c.id as noticeId , c.notice_type , c.notice_title , c.message_content , c.target_type , c.status , c.created_time as createdTime , 0 as readState from user_notice_config c where c.target_type = 3 and c.status = 0
and c.notice_type = #{vo.noticeType} and find_in_set(#{vo.deviceTerminal}, c.send_object)

select c.id as noticeId, t.id as targetId, c.notice_type, c.notice_title_i18n_code, c.message_content_i18n_code, c.target_type, c.status , c.created_time as createdTime , t.read_state as readState
from user_notice_target t left join user_notice_config c on t.notice_id = c.id where 1 = 1
and t.user_id = #{vo.userId} AND t.revoke_state = 1 AND t.delete_state = 1
AND (t.terminal IS NULL OR t.terminal = '' OR FIND_IN_SET(#{vo.deviceTerminal}, t.terminal))
and t.notice_type in (1,3)
AND t.notice_type = 2
union
SELECT t2.notice_id AS noticeId, t2.id AS targetId, CASE WHEN t2.notice_type = 4 THEN 3 ELSE t2.notice_type END AS noticeType, t2.notice_title_i18n_code, t2.message_content_i18n_code, t2.target_type, 1 as status, t2.created_time AS createdTime, t2.read_state AS readState FROM user_notice_target t2 WHERE t2.user_id = #{vo.userId} AND t2.revoke_state = 1 AND t2.delete_state = 1
AND t2.notice_type = 4
AND t2.notice_type = 2
order by readState asc, createdTime desc

select count(t.id)
from user_notice_target t
where 1 = 1
and user_id = #{userId} AND t.revoke_state = 1 AND t.delete_state = 1
AND (t.device_terminal_code IS NULL OR t.device_terminal_code = '' OR FIND_IN_SET(#{deviceTerminal}, t.device_terminal_code))
and t.notice_type in (1,3,4)
AND t.notice_type = 2

select count(t2.id) from user_notice_target t2
where t2.user_id = #{userId} and t2.revoke_state = 1 and t2.read_state = 0 and t2.notice_type = #{noticeType} and t2.delete_state = 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_notice_target t LEFT JOIN user_notice_config c ON c.id = t.notice_id WHERE t.user_id =#{userId} AND t.read_state = 0 AND t.revoke_state = 1 AND t.delete_state = 1 AND t.platform = 1 AND (c.status = 1 OR t.notice_type = 4) AND (c.terminal IS NULL OR c.terminal = '' OR FIND_IN_SET(#{terminal}, c.terminal))

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_notice_target t LEFT JOIN user_notice_config c ON c.id = t.notice_id WHERE t.user_id =#{userId} AND t.read_state = 0 AND t.revoke_state = 1 AND t.delete_state = 1 AND t.platform = 1 AND (c.status = 1 OR t.notice_type = 4) AND (t.notice_id is null or c.terminal IS NULL OR c.terminal = '' OR FIND_IN_SET(#{terminal}, c.terminal)) AND t.notice_type in (1,3,4)

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_notice_target t LEFT JOIN user_notice_config c ON c.id = t.notice_id WHERE t.user_id =#{userId} AND t.read_state = 0 AND t.revoke_state = 1 AND t.delete_state = 1 AND t.platform = 1 AND (c.status = 1 OR t.notice_type = 4) AND (c.terminal IS NULL OR c.terminal = '' OR FIND_IN_SET(#{terminal}, c.terminal)) AND t.notice_type =2
